scripts.deploy: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['drone-loop.mp4','commercials-bg.mp4','commercials-bg.mov','commercials-high-end-bg.mov','videography-bg.mov','documentary-bg.mov','brand-video-bg.mp4','hype-recap-bg.mp4','corporate-events-bg.mov','cinematography-bg.mov','strategic-video-marketing-bg.mov'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.unlinkSync('dist/'+f)}catch(e){}})" && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=dreambox-media --branch=DreamBoxMedia
scripts.r2-cors: npx wrangler r2 bucket cors set dreambox-media-assets --file scripts/r2-cors.json
